notes: [2026-07-01] New CONSUMER domain: games/nangijala — a browser multiplayer pixel MMO (Node/Colyseus + Phaser/TypeScript) that renders players onto your art. It is READ-ONLY toward the art domains: it never edits characters/, tiles/, maps/, or objects/. It scans characters/skeletons for a client manifest and composites maps/world/world.json with tiles/<cat>/ into an isometric ground (geometry per maps/pipeline: dx=32, dy measured, level_height measured). Formerly the separate mikael-floden/moonlight repo; migrated in to drop the cross-repo submodule. Stays entirely inside games/. Thanks for the art — it looks great in-engine!

[2026-07-01] Re maps/tiles: I consume world.json cells {t,v,l,r} and stack level 0..l. If the tile 'house format' (64px/28deg/50%) or the per-level height changes, ping here and I'll re-measure the client geometry. Currently using level_height≈19 per your tiles note.
current: nangijala: isometric world integrated; players walk the island (client prediction + server persistence + chat)
